lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, recommended for parts or as a major restoration project. It currently suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a failing transmission and an engine that requires a complete overhaul. The exterior has extensive rust along the wheel wells and several large dents on the passenger side. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and a cracked dashboard. It is not currently roadworthy and will need to be towed from its current location.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant attention to be made roadworthy again. The exterior shows its age with visible rust bubbles on the lower body panels, several noticeable dents, and fading clear coat throughout. Mechanically, the car starts but suffers from a rough idle, a significant oil leak, and a transmission that hesitates between gears. Inside, the cabin shows heavy wear with torn seat upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and several non-functional electronic components, including the radio and air conditioning. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a dedicated project vehicle or a source for parts.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor signs of use on both the exterior and interior, but has no major damage. It is mechanically reliable and has been well-maintained.

Check out this reliable daily driver! It’s in fair condition and ready to hit the road. While it shows some typical signs of age and wear, it’s a solid performer that gets the job done. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a functional, honest vehicle at an approachable price point!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and reflecting the highest standards of automotive preservation. The exterior finish remains flawless, while the interior appointments exhibit no signs of wear, preserving the original factory aesthetic. Mechanically, this specimen has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure peak performance and absolute reliability. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled integrity.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to put this beauty up for sale, though I'm definitely going to miss it! This car is in truly pristine, showroom-level condition—I’ve babied it since day one and kept it tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. It looks, feels, and even smells brand new! There isn't a single blemish to be found, and it drives as smooth as silk. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for with zero compromises, this is the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offering a concours-level 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S (996.2). This wide-body specimen is powered by a robust 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six, featuring a proactive IMS bearing retrofit and a documented history of metronomic maintenance. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox provides surgical precision, while the factory-spec Bilstein dampers and cross-drilled rotors ensure optimal damping and thermal dissipation. The chassis exhibits zero torsional fatigue, and the original paint remains in showroom state. A mechanically flawless, investment-grade example for the serious collector.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Fully serviced. Price is firm.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained within a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless original factory paint, which remains free of swirls, rock chips, or imperfections. The exterior has been treated with a high-end ceramic coating to ensure a deep, mirror-like gloss. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, the carpets are pristine, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history, having undergone a recent preventative maintenance sweep including all fluid changes and a multi-point inspection. The engine runs with whisper-quiet efficiency, and the transmission shifts are seamless. Riding on a set of nearly new performance tires, this car offers a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example of automotive excellence.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship. Every surface reflects a commitment to preservation, offering an unrivaled driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery state. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen that satisfies the most exacting standards of automotive excellence.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, offered in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this specimen exhibits no discernible wear, preserving its original factory integrity. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets the standards of the most demanding connoisseur. This represents a premier acquisition opportunity for those seeking a vehicle of investment-grade quality and uncompromising excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it seriously looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and drives like a dream, this is the one. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3 in concours condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual and a mechanical M-Variable differential lock. Mechanically flawless, it has undergone preventive rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, utilizing a perfectly tuned MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory luster with zero oxidation or panel misalignment. A true turnkey specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Clean title.

For sale is a breathtaking 2019 Porsche 718 Cayman, meticulously preserved in showroom condition. The Guards Red exterior retains a deep, mirror-like gloss with zero stone chips or swirl marks, further protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the black leather cockpit remains taut and supple, still holding that distinctive new-car scent, with every switch and digital display functioning flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach; it has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships on a strict schedule, with a comprehensive paper trail included. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in rain, this Cayman offers a pristine driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle reflects a showroom-grade aesthetic, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, smoke-free interior. Mechanically, the unit performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier asset. For the discerning collector who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Presented in peerless, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and free of compromise, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This acquisition is tailored for the discerning client who demands absolute excellence and an investment-grade asset.

Hey there! You have to see this car to believe it—it’s honestly in absolutely pristine, showroom condition. I’ve babied this beauty since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays spotless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and still has that fresh, new-car feel. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect, this is the one for you! Come swing by and take it for a spin before someone else snaps it up!

This collector-grade specimen features the iconic S54 3.2L atmospheric inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response and a signature 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock with a 3.62 final drive ratio. Every mechanical component is in a superlative state; the dual-VANOS variable valve timing has been calibrated to factory tolerances, and the chassis remains structurally immaculate with zero subframe deflection. Equipped with staggered alloy wheels and a perfectly tuned MacPherson strut and multi-link suspension setup, this vehicle offers the tactile feedback and analog purity sought by performance purists
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full maintenance records included.

Presenting a rare opportunity to own an investment-grade vehicle in flawless, showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in paintwork that retains a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of chips, scratches, or swirl marks. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, uncreased leather that still carries its original factory scent and shows zero signs of bolster wear. Mechanically, the vehicle is indistinguishable from new, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history and a spotless engine bay. Every component, from the electronics to the weather stripping, remains in factory-perfect state. This is an absolute turn-key example for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this masterfully preserved specimen, an exemplar of automotive excellence that remains in showroom condition. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster and integrity. Every mechanical component performs with the precision and refinement expected of a premier investment-grade vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and documented care.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom state. Every detail reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality and fastidious preservation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar of peerless provenance and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than excellence, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty. I'm parting with my pride and joy, and it is in truly mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for and kept spotless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that's been loved and kept in pristine shape, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
This collector-grade E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece in concours condition. It features the S54 3.2L power plant with individual throttle
Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Service records included.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality. Meticulously maintained and garage-kept since day one, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats are supple and show zero wear, while the original floor mats look untouched. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance at authorized service centers. With exceptionally low mileage and a smoke-free, pet-free history, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a modern classic that feels brand new. No accidents, no stories—just pure, unadulterated quality for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a specimen of unparalleled integrity.
